note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 4.9 cm x 1.6 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 40% slough, 60% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Nutritional consult ordered.

Wound note - Abdominalwal. Meas 4.9x1.6x0.8cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 54% gran, 46% slough. Periwound intact. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Lefebvre notified.
